# STARTER_ACCESSIBILITY_FEEDBACK_AUDIT

Use this starter for **Accessibility Feedback Audit**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/lite_routes/rt_accessibility_feedback_audit.md`
- `dist/lite_contracts/accessibility_feedback_audit.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/accessibility-feedback-expert.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/ui-system-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/color-system-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/component-systems-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when a user task is blocked or degraded by semantic, focus, keyboard, or announcement failures.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1545 words / ~2055 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_UI.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Accessibility Feedback Audit. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
